RULING:
PLAINTIFFS ROGER HUWE & OLIVER HUWE'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT POLAR-MOHR MASCHINENVERTRIEBSGESELLSCHAFT GMBH AND CO. KOMMANDITGESELLSCHAFT, TO PRODUCE ITS CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS AND PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE FOR DEPOSITION AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS AT DEPOSITION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to compel defendant Polar-Mohr Maschinevertriebsgesellschaft GmBH & Co. Kommanditgesellschaft to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition in San Francisco and to produce documents at deposition is denied. This court has no power to compel California depositions of nonresident defendant's PMK and COR. (See C.C.P. 1989, I-CA Enterprises, Inc. v. Palram Americas, Inc. (2015) 235 Cal.App.4th 257, 280-282.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Cindy Garis of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 402 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)
